title: KIMOBER 144PCS Halloween Bottle Labels, Assoeted Vintage Laminated Animal Apothecary Potion Bottles Stickers for Halloween Party Supplies Photo Props
description:
About this item
Package Includes: The Halloween bottle labels set includes 144pcs animal apothecary stickers with 36 different styles,ach style with 4 pieces.Each Halloween medicine glass label stickers are approx. 8.5 x 4.5 cm / 3.3 x 1.8 inch,which is suitable for small size wine bottles or glass bottles.
High-Quality Material: The vintage apothecary bottle stickers are made of coated paper materiall with definition printing,not easy to get wet, fade or break.These Halloween vintage laminated wine bottle labels have strong stickiness,you don't need to worry about the risk of stickers falling off.
36 Halloween Theme Patterns: The scary potions labels stickers set includes 36 different weird and retro animal Halloween patterns.Each animal pattern with different texts,which can add more details to your Halloween medicine bottle decoracion, create a scary atmosphere.
Easy to Tear: Each Halloween animal bottle label sticker was pre-cut into small size,which make these apothecary stickers are very easy to use.Clean the surface before apply.Take off the sticker.Paste it where you want,such as clean smooth surface like glass bottles,wine bottles,jars,gift bags.
Wide Application: These assoeted animal potions label stickers are suitable for most types of bottles decorations and can also stick them on gift bags, Halloween party supplies, invitation cards,gift boxes,Halloween cards envelopes, scrapbook,photo albumand so on.
reviews_5s: Save a few spice jars and use your DIY imagination!These are so cute and definitely worth the money! They have 4 stickers of every design, they’re a little spooky but mostly cute. I put them on Mason Jars and other little bottles in my home that I don’t use and just leave out for Decor. I use them all year round but if you’re looking for something for Halloween they’re perfect. They’re a little on the bigger side so if you have small vials these will be too big but they’re perfect for everything else!Just what I needed for my witchy potion bottles.Really neat spooky apothecary labels. I’ve been out Halloween decor hunting a lot over the years and am always checking out the potion bottles they sell in the stores. I’ve never found one that was just right. Sometimes I love the label but hate the bottle or the other way around. So I was so happy to find these labels to make my own custom bottles. I really like the cat, the snail, the shark, and the mermaid. So many good ones in this set really. It’s cool that they included how to use each item as well. I think these labels were well thought out and have nice artwork. The size of these labels is plenty big and they have a semi-gloss finish. Overall, I’m impressed given the price point and will post an update once I do my Halloween themed arts and crafts.
reviews_1s: These are the thinnest stickers.. they don't stick very well at all. I wish I could have given 0 stars what a waste of time and money.
